story_overview: In a quiet futuristic city, a small curious robot awakens alone in a workshop. The small curious robot explores the world outside for the first time, learning about nature and emotion. Along the journey, the small curious robot meets a little girl who offers kindness. Together, the small curious robot and the little girl discover the meaning of friendship in a world of steel and sunlight. The story is gentle, emotional, and full of wonder, emphasizing curiosity, connection, and warmth.
reconstruct_target:
[Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands
[Person B] little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands; shot caption: [Person A] powers on atop a cluttered repair station inside a cozy workshop filled with spare parts and glowing screens. He slowly raises his binocular eyes, scans the room, and notices a hand-drawn picture pinned beside the workbench.

global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands; shot caption: [Person A] rolls along the workbench and carefully picks up the drawing with his mechanical hands. He studies the smiling child in the picture, then stores the drawing gently inside a small compartment in his chest.

global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands; shot caption: [Person A] stops at the open workshop doorway where warm sunlight spills across the floor. Holding the drawing against his chest, he rolls outside into the bright city, eager to discover the world beyond the workshop.
first_frame_prompt: Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body, large blue optical eyes, tiny articulated hands, small wheel feet, and a soft blue chest light awakening at a cluttered robotics workbench in a warm futuristic workshop.
Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body and large blue optical eyes touching a tiny spinning gear on a metal workbench surrounded by scattered tools.
Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body and small wheel feet facing an open workshop doorway filled with golden daylight.

He pauses beside a wooden bench and compares the drawing in his hand with the people passing through the park.

global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] sits on a park bench sketching in a notebook when [Person A] slowly approaches and reveals the folded drawing from his chest compartment. [Person B] looks up with surprise and curiosity, noticing the picture in his hands.

global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] kneels beside [Person A] and points between the old drawing and herself with a bright smile. [Person A] tilts his binocular eyes excitedly and rolls in a small circle as if celebrating the discovery.

global caption: [Person A]: WALL·E small boxy yellow robot with weathered metal body, binocular eyes, tank treads, and expressive mechanical hands, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person A] and [Person B] walk side by side along a tree-lined park path in the golden afternoon light. first_frame_prompt: Small childlike silver robot with large blue optical eyes standing near a wooden park bench where a little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs, a yellow cardigan, and a denim dress holds an open sketchpad.
Little girl with medium-brown skin, curly dark hair in two puffs, a yellow cardigan, and a denim dress offering a folded paper flower to a small childlike silver robot with careful articulated hands.

Small childlike silver robot and little girl in a yellow cardigan sitting side by side on a wooden park bench, with the folded paper flower resting in the robot hands and an open sketchpad on the girl lap.
Small childlike silver robot sitting alone beneath a glowing streetlamp at dusk, holding a folded paper flower while a little girl in a yellow cardigan walks away along the park path.
